subject: Create result validation hook (validate-result.sh + hooks.json)
description:
Create a PostToolUse hook that validates result files written by task-executor agents. Register the hook in hooks.json.

**What to implement:**

1. Create `claude/sdd-tools/hooks/validate-result.sh` (~50 lines):
   - Trigger on Write operations targeting `result-task-*.md` in session directory
   - Filter: only act when file path matches `*/result-task-*.md`
   - Validate first line matches `status: (PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL)`
   - Validate required sections present: `## Summary`, `## Files Modified`, `## Context Contribution`
   - Validate corresponding `context-task-{id}.md` exists (write-ordering invariant)
   - If context file missing: create stub `### Task [{id}]: No learnings captured`
   - If invalid: rename to `result-task-{id}.md.invalid` with error description appended
   - NEVER exit non-zero (defensive: trap on ERR, fall through on any error)
   - Debug logging to stderr via `AGENT_ALCHEMY_HOOK_DEBUG=1` env var
   - Follow patterns from existing `auto-approve-session.sh`

2. Update `claude/sdd-tools/hooks/hooks.json`:
   - Add PostToolUse hook entry for validate-result.sh
   - Pattern: `Write`
   - Command: `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/validate-result.sh`
   - Timeout: 5000ms

**Reference for hook patterns:**
- Read `claude/sdd-tools/hooks/auto-approve-session.sh` (~75 lines) as model

**Files to create:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/hooks/validate-result.sh` (new, ~50 lines)

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/hooks/hooks.json` (~20 lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Hook triggers on Write to result-task-*.md files
- [ ] Valid result files (PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL status, all sections) are accepted unchanged
- [ ] Missing status line causes file to be renamed to .invalid
- [ ] Invalid status value causes file to be renamed to .invalid
- [ ] Missing required section (Summary, Files Modified, Context Contribution) causes .invalid rename
- [ ] Missing context-task-{id}.md triggers stub creation, result file still accepted
- [ ] Hook registered in hooks.json with PostToolUse event, Write pattern, 5s timeout

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Non-session file writes (unrelated paths) are ignored by hook
- [ ] Result files with >25 lines are accepted (first sections validated, extra content allowed with warning)
- [ ] Agent writes result before context: stub created, result accepted

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Hook NEVER exits non-zero (trap on ERR falls through)
- [ ] Malformed input to hook is caught by trap, exits 0
- [ ] Debug logging only when AGENT_ALCHEMY_HOOK_DEBUG=1

_Performance:_
- [ ] Hook execution < 100ms per invocation

**Testing Requirements:**
• Shell (bats): Valid PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL result accepted
• Shell (bats): Missing status line → .invalid rename
• Shell (bats): Invalid status value → .invalid rename
• Shell (bats): Missing section → .invalid rename
• Shell (bats): Missing context file → stub created
• Shell (bats): Non-session file → ignored
• Shell (bats): Hook error → trap catches, exit 0

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.2
